headline: I Keep Buying Seagate Because It Has One Massive Cost Advantage Others Don’t
summary: Physics turned into a bill of materials convinced me to keep adding to one hard drive maker, even as insiders sell and a forward P/E of 37 raises eyebrows from value investors who remember what cyclicality does to hardware names.

raw.headline: I Keep Buying Seagate Because It Has One Massive Cost Advantage Others Don’t
raw.summary: Physics turned into a bill of materials convinced me to keep adding to one hard drive maker, even as insiders sell and a forward P/E of 37 raises eyebrows from value investors who remember what cyclicality does to hardware names.

headline: The SOX Index Fell 16% in Less Than a Month
summary: The same chipmakers that have been investors' AI darlings are some of the biggest drags on today's market. The PHLX Semiconductor Index is down 2.3% today, a 16% drop from the index's closing high, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: Chip Stocks Sink, Pulling Indexes Lower
